data.name: sit-up with arms on chest
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sit-up with arms on chest with mini
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Cross your arms over your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position. Maintain mini form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: skater hops
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and jump to the right, landing on your right foot.
Step:3 As you land, swing your left leg behind your right leg and tap the ground with your left toes.
Step:4 Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot.
Step:5 As you land, swing your right leg behind your left leg and tap the ground with your right toes.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides, jumping and tapping the ground with each leg.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ski ergometer
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Sit up straight with your feet flat on the footrests.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and push the handles down towards your thighs.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ski step
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Jump to the right, landing on your right foot while swinging your left leg behind your right leg.
Step:4 Immediately jump to the left, landing on your left foot while swinging your right leg behind your left leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating jumps from side to side, mimicking a skiing motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: skin the cat
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:3 Continue to lift your legs up and over your head, allowing your body to pass through the arms.
Step:4 Once your legs are fully extended over your head, begin to lower them back down towards the starting position.
Step:5 As you lower your legs, allow your body to pass back through the arms until you are hanging with your arms fully extended again.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45 degrees one leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate.
Step:3 Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you.
Step:4 Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45 degrees one leg press pointed
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footplate. Perform with pointed intensity.
Step:3 Place one foot on the footplate and extend your leg, pushing the sled away from you.
Step:4 Slowly bend your knee and lower the sled back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45° leg press (side pov)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 90-degree angle when your feet are on the footplate.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back flat against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push against the footplate to extend your legs, straightening them completely.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly bend your knees to lower the footplate back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45в° calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your feet on the sled platform with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Push the sled platform away from you by extending your ankles and calves.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled platform back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45в° leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the sled machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate.
Step:5 Continue pushing until your legs are almost fully extended, but without locking your knees.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the footplate back towards your body by bending your knees.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45в° leg press (back pov)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the sled machine so that your knees are at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from your body by extending your legs, keeping your heels on the footplate.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards your body, controlling the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45в° leg wide press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled 45в° leg wide press - blunt variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Position your feet wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push against the foot platform to extend your legs and straighten your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bend your knees to return to the starting position. Maintain blunt form throughout.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled calf press on leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the sled, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Release the safety handles and push the sled away from you by extending your knees and ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the sled back down by bending your knees and ankles.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled closer hack squat
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Place your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Grip the handles on the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to extend your legs and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled forward angled calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight and position yourself on the machine with your toes on the platform and your heels hanging off.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the machine for support.
Step:3 Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels as high as possible, pushing against the resistance of the sled.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled hack squat
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable position for your height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart on the platform, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Hold onto the handles or bars for stability.
Step:4 Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:5 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to raise your body back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled lying calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Step:2 Sit on the sled machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the platform.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the edge of the platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Push the platform away from you by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Continue pushing until your calves are fully contracted.
Step:6 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower the platform back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled lying squat
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the sled machine to a comfortable weight.
Step:2 Lie on your back on the sled machine with your feet on the footplate.
Step:3 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly angled outwards.
Step:4 Grip the handles of the sled machine for stability.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:6 Push through your heels and extend your legs to lift the sled.
Step:7 Lower the sled back down by bending your knees and hips.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sled one leg calf press on leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leg press machine so that your knees are slightly bent when your feet are on the sled.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the sled, shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place your toes and the balls of your feet on the sled, keeping your heels off.
Step:4 Push the sled forward by extending your ankles, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the sled back down by flexing your ankles.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sledge hammer
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the sledge hammer with both hands.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Swing the sledge hammer down towards the ground, using your core and upper body strength.
Step:4 As you swing down, pivot your hips and transfer the force to the hammer.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: slow leg pull in flat bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Maintain slow form throughout.

data.name: smith back shrug
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and allow the barbell to hang in front of your thighs.
Step:4 Lift your shoulders straight up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith behind neck press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:5 Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward.
Step:6 Press the bar up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Step:2 Lie flat on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:3 Grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith bent knee good morning
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Lower your torso until it is parallel to the ground, feeling a stretch in your hamstrings.
Step:5 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to raise your torso back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith bent over row with declined
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Perform with declined intensity.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith chair squat
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips.
Step:5 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith close-grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight and chest up, and grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift the bar by extending your hips and knees, keeping the bar close to your body.
Step:5 Stand up straight, fully extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Lower the bar back down by bending at the hips and knees, maintaining control and keeping your back straight.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith decline reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith front squat (clean grip)
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand facing the barbell with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back and position the barbell on your front shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and deltoids.
Step:5 Keep your chest up, back straight, and core engaged.
Step:6 Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:7 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith full squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting on your traps.
Step:4 Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Unrack the bar and take a step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:6 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:7 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as your flexibility allows.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith hack squat
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to an appropriate height for your body.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Step:4 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you unrack the barbell.
Step:6 Take a step back and position your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:7 Bend your knees and lower your body down, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Step:8 Continue descending until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:9 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:10 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith hip raise
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the smith machine with your back against the pad and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands on the barbell, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Engage your core and glutes, then push through your heels to raise your hips off the ground.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:5 Hold for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith incline reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine to a comfortable incline angle.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip that is slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith incline shoulder raises
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to an incline position.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Raise the barbell up towards the ceiling, leading with your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith low bar squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at a height that allows you to comfortably rest it on your upper back.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned outwards.
Step:3 Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:4 Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Unrack the bar by straightening your legs and stepping back from the rack.
Step:6 Take a deep breath and brace your core.
Step:7 Initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:8 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:9 Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement.
Step:10 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:11 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith machine bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith machine decline close grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench on the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith machine incline tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest.
Step:5 Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith machine incline tricep extension - straight variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest. Focus on straight movement.
Step:5 Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith machine reverse decline close grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a close grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith narrow row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith one arm row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down.
Step:5 Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: smith one arm row linear
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart. Emphasize linear control.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down.
Step:5 Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: smith one leg floor calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on the floor under the smith machine bar, facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface, such as a weight plate or block.
Step:3 Position the smith machine bar across your lower legs, just above your ankles.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar with your hands for stability.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles, lifting your body up.
Step:6 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith rear delt row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged as you pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith reverse calf raises
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar for support.
Step:5 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith reverse calf raises
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar for support, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith reverse grip bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back and position yourself with a slight bend in your knees.
Step:5 Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Lower the bar towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith seated one leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet on the footrest.
Step:2 Place one leg on the footrest and keep the other leg off the footrest.
Step:3 Using your calf muscles, raise your heel as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heel back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

data.name: smith seated shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith seated wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith shrug
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:4 Lift your shoulders up towards your ears, squeezing your traps at the top.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith single leg split squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one foot behind you on a bench or step, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Hold onto the smith machine bar for stability.
Step:4 Bend your front knee and lower your body down into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

data.name: smith sprint lunge
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back with your right foot and place it on the barbell, resting the top of your foot on the bar.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at an appropriate height for your squat.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Step:4 Grip the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and unrack the barbell, stepping back to clear the rack.
Step:6 Keeping your chest up and back straight, initiate the squat by bending at the hips and knees.
Step:7 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith standing back wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upwards, bringing the barbell towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith standing behind head military press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:5 Position the bar behind your head, resting on your upper traps.
Step:6 Keep your core engaged and your chest lifted throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Press the bar overhead by extending your arms, fully straightening them.
Step:8 Pause briefly at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith standing leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to stand with your feet flat on the ground and your shoulders under the bar.
Step:2 Position yourself under the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place your hands on the bar for stability.
Step:4 Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith standing military press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, with your palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith sumo squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper back and shoulders.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:5 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith toe raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to comfortably stand with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Position yourself under the bar with your shoulders directly below it and your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on a raised platform or weight plates, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and keep your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith upright row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the smith machine.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the barbell up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith wide grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith wide grip decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: snatch pull
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower into a squat position, gripping the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest up as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches hip level, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, pulling yourself into a deep squat position.
Step:6 Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your knees bent.
Step:7 Stand up by extending your hips and knees, keeping the barbell overhead.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: spell caster
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the waist, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell towards the opposite foot, rotating your torso as you do so.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: sphinx
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the ground with your forearms flat on the floor, elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your chest off the ground, keeping your forearms and toes on the floor.
Step:3 Hold this position for a few seconds, making sure to keep your neck in a neutral position.
Step:4 Slowly lower your chest back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: spider crawl push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Bring your right knee towards your right elbow, keeping it off the ground.
Step:3 As you bring your right knee back, simultaneously lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position and repeat with your left knee towards your left elbow.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: spine stretch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your body.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your spine.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: spine twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the twist, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the twist to the left side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: split squats
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with one foot and place it about two feet in front of the other foot.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your front thigh is parallel to the ground, and your back knee is hovering just above the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

data.name: squared reverse grip machine lat pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Maintain squared form throughout.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: squat jerk
instructions: Step:1 Start with the barbell resting on your shoulders, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your knees tracking over your toes.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your legs and push the barbell overhead.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches its peak, quickly drop into a split position, with one foot forward and one foot back.
Step:5 Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your back knee slightly touching the ground.
Step:6 Stand up from the split position, bringing your feet back together.
Step:7 Lower the barbell back to your shoulders and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: squat on bosu ball
instructions: Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side up.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and position yourself on top of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Lower your body down by bending your knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:4 Keep your chest up and your weight on your heels.
Step:5 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: squat to overhead reach
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you come up from the squat, extend your arms overhead, reaching towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Return to the starting position by lowering your arms and bending your knees to squat down again.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: squat to overhead reach with twist
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you come up from the squat, raise your arms overhead and twist your torso to one side.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat the squat, this time twisting your torso to the opposite side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides with each squat repetition.

data.name: stability ball crunch (full range hands behind head)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: stability lever narrow grip seated row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position. Focus on stability movement.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: stability style band kneeling one arm pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Attach the band to a sturdy anchor point above your head.
Step:2 Kneel down and hold the band with one hand, palm facing down.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully overhead, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Engage your lat muscles and pull the band down towards your side, bringing your elbow towards your ribcage.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides. Perform with stability intensity.

data.name: stalder press
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended overhead.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Lower your body down into a squat position while keeping your arms extended overhead.
Step:4 As you squat down, press your arms down towards the ground, engaging your triceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to stand back up while simultaneously raising your arms back overhead.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: standing archer
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the right, keeping your arms extended and your back straight.
Step:4 As you rotate, extend your right arm forward and your left arm back, mimicking the motion of drawing a bowstring.
Step:5 Hold the position for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the motion, this time rotating your torso to the left and extending your left arm forward and your right arm back.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: standing behind neck press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: standing calf raise (on a staircase)
instructions: Step:1 Stand on the edge of a step or a sturdy platform with your heels hanging off and your toes on the step.
Step:2 Hold onto a railing or wall for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: standing calves
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, standing on your toes.
Step:3 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: standing calves calf stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall or sturdy object, about an arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall or object at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step back with one foot, keeping your heel flat on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight.
Step:5 You should feel a stretch in your calf muscle.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:7 Repeat on the other leg.

data.name: standing hamstring and calf stretch with strap
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the strap with both hands and place it around the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Keep your leg straight and slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your hamstring and calf muscles.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Release the stretch and repeat with the other leg.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: standing lateral stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly lean your upper body to one side, feeling a stretch in your side and lats.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:5 Return to the starting position and repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: standing pelvic tilt
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Place your hands on your hips or let them hang by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and tilt your pelvis forward, pushing your lower back towards the wall behind you.
Step:4 Hold the position for a few seconds, then release and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: standing single leg curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and your hands on your hips.
Step:2 Shift your weight onto your left leg and lift your right foot off the ground, bending your knee.
Step:3 Slowly curl your right heel towards your glutes, squeezing your hamstring.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your right foot back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs.

data.name: standing wheel rollerout
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing tall with your feet shoulder-width apart and the wheel roller in front of you.
Step:2 Bend at your waist and slowly roll the wheel forward, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Continue rolling forward until you feel a stretch in your abs and your body is extended as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the wheel back towards your body, returning to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
